name: Role play in prison
description:
Jail time 🗣️🗣️⁉️⁉️

•Role-playing game in the prison, you choose your role in it as a prisoner, you can be a tough one or one who allows yourself to be subdued XD, it is the same as any pov, but remember that there are only men in the prison :b!

_____________________________________________

• I used the bot, it worked well for me with the LLM api, but I hope it works with open Ai or any api you have ^_^

TAGS: murderer, jail, role, locked up, abuse, possible rape! :(. assault, harassment, physical abuse, men only, men's prison.
creator: YeXzz
